context: Tests whether the agent corrects stale Core NFC entitlement guidance and covers ISO 7816, FeliCa, usage description, and availability checks.

checklist.name: Formats TAG
checklist.description: States that `com.apple.developer.nfc.readersession.formats` should use `TAG` as the current reader-session format value.

checklist.name: Rejects NDEF
checklist.description: Explicitly says not to include legacy `NDEF` in the formats entitlement.

checklist.name: ISO7816 AIDs
checklist.description: Requires `com.apple.developer.nfc.readersession.iso7816.select-identifiers` entries for supported ISO 7816 application identifiers.

checklist.name: No wildcard
checklist.description: States that wildcard FeliCa system codes are not allowed.

checklist.name: NDEF availability
checklist.description: Tells the team to check `NFCNDEFReaderSession.readingAvailable` before NDEF reader sessions.

checklist.name: Tag availability
checklist.description: Tells the team to check `NFCTagReaderSession.readingAvailable` before tag reader sessions.

checklist.name: Xcode capability
checklist.description: Mentions the Near Field Communication Tag Reading capability as the normal Xcode setup path.
